codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. Created transcript.rs with TranscriptEventType enum (ToolCall, LlmResponse, StateTransition, Error), TranscriptEvent struct with id/timestamp/session_id/payload, TranscriptLog append-only log with type indexing and broadcast for subscribers, and TranscriptSubscriber async receiver with type filtering. 26 tests all pass. Clippy clean.

sharedStateObservations.observation: rust-worker skill file does not exist at expected path .factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md. Transcript skeleton shows worker called 'rust-worker' skill, but the actual skill file was not available to review procedure adherence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows ## Tool: Skill with skill='rust-worker' followed by reading mission.md, validation-contract.md, features.json, exploring codebase structure, then implementation. Worker appears to have followed a logical procedure but I cannot verify against the actual skill document.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Append-only invariant is well-enforced via API design - no public methods for removal or modification, and test `test_transcript_log_is_append_only` explicitly verifies this. This pattern is consistent with the existing kill_switch and circuit_breaker patterns in swell-core.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: TranscriptLog has no remove(), clear(), or other mutators beyond append(). events() returns immutable slice.

summary: Feature implementation passes review. The typed, append-only event log is correctly implemented with all 4 event types (ToolCall, LlmResponse, StateTransition, Error), proper indexing by type for efficient filtering, and async subscriber pattern for event consumption. 26 tests cover all functionality. One pre-existing test failure (test_missing_layers_handled_gracefully) documented separately.
